queue_item.action: Preserve stable project identity across aliases, abbreviations, nicknames, and misspellings without inventing rename events.

progress.memory: Mirror Cartographer remains one canonical project identity; written variants are aliases unless an explicit provenance-backed rename decision exists.
progress.privacy_boundary: Only an abstract project-identity and alias-resolution rule was persisted; no verbatim dialogue or personal material was copied.
progress.verification: Fetch the committed artifact from the default branch, confirm its blob SHA, and parse its JSON structure.

queue_item.handoff: Build an additive alias inventory with first-observed provenance and ambiguity flags, then continue exhaustive M-008 replay when a complete recursive tree is available.

claim_state.observed: The project retained one identity while multiple written forms and informal variants were used.
claim_state.inferred: Treating variants as renames fragments project continuity.
claim_state.proposed: Represent variants as alias_of edges to one canonical project node unless an explicit rename decision is found.
claim_state.superseded: Inferring a rename from spelling, spacing, capitalization, nickname, or abbreviation changes alone.
claim_state.unresolved: The exhaustive alias inventory and first-observed provenance remain incomplete.
